$comment: DERIVED, CI-VALIDATED MIRROR of the inline profile logic in scripts/install.sh (PLAN-153 item B4). install.sh does NOT read this file yet — it remains the single runtime truth; drift between the two turns CI red via .claude/scripts/check-install-profiles.py. The consumption flip (install.sh reading this manifest + --dry-run --json) is a recorded follow-up, see 'consumption' below.

derivation.profile_semantics: --profile is a comma-separated list. 'core' and 'frontend' select the matching .claude/skills/<name>/ tree; any other token selects .claude/skills/domains/<token>/ if that directory exists (else install.sh WARNs and skips it). Hooks/scripts/commands/dispatcher are installed UNCONDITIONALLY for every profile selection; per-profile hook_stacks below is therefore always ['base'].

orthogonal_dimensions.--stack: node|none (help text); merges templates/settings/settings.stack.<name>.json over the base settings template. Orthogonal to --profile — modeled as hook_stacks definitions here, never referenced by profiles.
orthogonal_dimensions.--ceremony: maintainer|user; ceremony=user swaps the base settings template to templates/settings/settings.user.json (advisory-only hook surface). Orthogonal to --profile.

derivation.stability_rule: stable = profiles in default_profiles UNION domains with a dedicated `has_profile "<name>"` block in install.sh; every other domain (accepted only via the generic domain loop) is experimental. Machine-enforced by check-install-profiles.py.

est_context_cost_rule.metric: count of SKILL.md files under the profile's skill root

base.description: Universal governance hook surface: .claude/hooks/ top-level *.py/*.sh + _lib/ runtime, wired via the base settings template. Installed for EVERY profile selection (install.sh section 5 installs hooks unconditionally).

user-ceremony.description: Advisory-only hook surface for --ceremony user installs (no-GPG, .claude/-only writes). Replaces the base template.

node.description: Node stack overlay — tsc + vitest pre-commit gate merged into settings.json via jq.

otel.description: OpenTelemetry env overlay merged via jq.

sandbox.description: Sandbox env overlay merged via jq.

profiles.name: core
profiles.description: Universal CEO-protocol skill set (.claude/skills/core/) — governance, orchestration, debate, audit. Installed when 'core' is in --profile; part of the install.sh default profile list.

profiles.name: frontend
profiles.description: Frontend specialist skill set (.claude/skills/frontend/) — accessibility, design systems, performance, UX. Installed when 'frontend' is in --profile; part of the install.sh default profile list.

consumption.honesty: install.sh still carries the inline truth; this manifest is a mirror validated in CI. Flipping install.sh to CONSUME this file is a follow-up staged change owned by the installer track.

dry_run_json_contract.description: SPEC (v1, not yet implemented): `install.sh <target> --dry-run --json` will emit exactly one JSON object on stdout, write nothing to disk, and exit 0. Human dry-run output moves to stderr in this mode.
